name: Community Center Rio Grande Pickleballers
description: Community Center Rio Grande Pickleballers is a place to play pickleball in South Fork, CO. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Marsh Park
description: Come play pickleball at Marsh Park in Monte Vista, CO! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: New Hope
description: New Hope is a place to play pickleball in South Fork, CO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
